The '''President's Guest Floor''' was a floor of the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Presidential Palace]] (later the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]]) for special guests of the [[President of the Senate]], [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]], [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] and various other government officials who used the Palace. It had several suites, and the entire floor was done in ornate hand-carved woods and had old-fashioned hinge doors. It was one of the few places that [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] left strictly alone when he began to occupy and remodel the palace. He usually reserved it for guests who had fond feelings of days past or could be impressed by such things. At least one suite was done completely in [[Fijisi]] wood from [[Cardooine/Legends|Cardooine]].

[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], [[Zakarisz Ghent|Ghent]], [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] were all staying on the President's Guests floor prior to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] [[Siege of Coruscant|attack]].
